description_long: This is a compact mechanical keyboard with a beige color scheme, featuring a standard set of alphanumeric and function keys arranged in a rectangular layout. The keycaps are slightly concave and made of plastic, with black printed legends in English. The keyboard is mounted on a visible brown circuit board, with some green electronic components exposed along the top edge. There is no visible casing or enclosure, exposing the underlying PCB and switch mechanisms. The spacebar is elongated and centrally positioned, and the overall build appears utilitarian, likely from an older or industrial device. The keyboard shows some signs of wear and lacks any branding or decorative elements.
description: A compact, beige mechanical keyboard with exposed circuit board and green electronic components, featuring English-labeled keycaps and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, spacebar, and exposed brown circuit board beneath the keys.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the staggered key rows and the exposed side of the circuit board.
description_view_2: Top-down edge view showing the uniform height of the keycaps and the row of green components along the back.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the staggered key rows and the exposed circuit board edge.
